activities_projects.title: Angle Deduction Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Use the angle sum property of quadrilaterals
steps: Calculate the fourth angle using the angle sum rule

activities_projects.title: Parallelogram Property Verification
steps: Verify if opposite sides and angles are equal

activities_projects.title: Diagonal Bisector Investigation
steps: Measure the segments formed by their intersection
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises that diagonals bisect each other

activities_projects.title: Rectangle Diagonal Experiment
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Observes that rectangle diagonals are equal

activities_projects.title: Square Diagonal Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Explore diagonal properties of a square
steps: Measure the angles formed at the intersection
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands diagonals of a square intersect at right angles

activities_projects.title: Construct a Parallelogram
activities_projects.objective: Construct a parallelogram using given measurements
steps: Create a given angle at one end
Construct the parallelogram using parallel lines

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral Classification Tree
steps: Create a diagram showing their relationships
Show how squares, rectangles, and parallelograms are related

activities_projects.title: Unknown Angle Puzzle
steps: Create a quadrilateral with three given angles

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Quadrilateral Investigation
steps: Observe objects in your classroom or home
